buildCommand: pnpm install && pnpm turbo run build --filter=merchant-admin

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.vayva.ng https://*.paystack.co https://*.vercel-insights.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
